# Contract: Signaling Server WebSocket Messages
*Generated by /speckit-plan — 2026-05-15*

All messages are JSON-encoded strings over a WebSocket connection to `wss://<server>/`.

---

## Authentication Handshake

Must complete before any other message is accepted. Server closes the socket with code 4001 if auth is not received within 5 seconds.

### Client → Server

```json
{ "type": "auth", "token": "<Firebase ID token>" }
```

### Server → Client

```json
{ "type": "auth-ok", "user": { "id": "uid", "displayName": "Alice", "avatarUrl": "https://..." } }
```
```json
{ "type": "auth-error", "reason": "invalid-token" | "expired-token" | "missing-token" }
```

---

## Lobby Browser

### Client → Server

```json
{ "type": "list-lobbies" }
```

### Server → Client

```json
{
  "type": "lobby-list",
  "lobbies": [
    { "id": "abc123", "hostDisplayName": "Alice", "memberCount": 3, "createdAt": 1716000000000 }
  ]
}
```

---

## Lobby Lifecycle

### Client → Server: Create

```json
{ "type": "create-lobby", "isPublic": true }
```

### Server → Client: Created

```json
{
  "type": "lobby-created",
  "lobby": { "id": "abc123", "code": "XK9F2M", "isPublic": true, "isLocked": false, "hostPeerId": "peer-uuid" },
  "self": { "peerId": "peer-uuid" },
  "turnCredentials": { "urls": ["turn:..."], "username": "...", "credential": "...", "ttl": 3600 }
}
```

### Client → Server: Join

```json
{ "type": "join-lobby", "lobbyId": "abc123" }
```
```json
{ "type": "join-lobby", "lobbyId": "abc123", "code": "XK9F2M" }
```
*(code required for private lobbies)*

### Server → Client: Joined

```json
{
  "type": "lobby-joined",
  "lobby": { "id": "abc123", "code": "XK9F2M", "isPublic": false, "isLocked": false, "hostPeerId": "peer-uuid-host" },
  "self": { "peerId": "peer-uuid-self" },
  "peers": [
    { "peerId": "peer-uuid-host", "displayName": "Alice", "avatarUrl": "https://...", "isHost": true }
  ],
  "turnCredentials": { "urls": ["turn:..."], "username": "...", "credential": "...", "ttl": 3600 }
}
```

### Server → Client: Join Error

```json
{ "type": "join-error", "reason": "lobby-full" | "not-found" | "locked" | "invalid-code" | "already-in-lobby" }
```

### Client → Server: Leave

```json
{ "type": "leave-lobby" }
```

---

## Peer Events (Server → All Lobby Members)

### Peer Joined

```json
{
  "type": "peer-joined",
  "peer": { "peerId": "...", "displayName": "Bob", "avatarUrl": "https://...", "isHost": false }
}
```

### Peer Left

```json
{ "type": "peer-left", "peerId": "..." }
```

### Host Promoted

```json
{ "type": "host-promoted", "newHostPeerId": "..." }
```

### Lobby Updated (privacy/lock changes)

```json
{ "type": "lobby-updated", "lobby": { "id": "...", "isPublic": false, "isLocked": true } }
```

---

## WebRTC Signaling Relay

Server relays these messages verbatim between named peers without inspection.

### Client → Server

```json
{ "type": "relay-offer",  "targetPeerId": "...", "sdp": { "type": "offer",  "sdp": "..." } }
{ "type": "relay-answer", "targetPeerId": "...", "sdp": { "type": "answer", "sdp": "..." } }
{ "type": "relay-ice",    "targetPeerId": "...", "candidate": { "candidate": "...", "sdpMid": "...", "sdpMLineIndex": 0 } }
```

### Server → Client (relayed)

```json
{ "type": "offer",  "fromPeerId": "...", "sdp": { "type": "offer",  "sdp": "..." } }
{ "type": "answer", "fromPeerId": "...", "sdp": { "type": "answer", "sdp": "..." } }
{ "type": "ice",    "fromPeerId": "...", "candidate": { "candidate": "...", "sdpMid": "...", "sdpMLineIndex": 0 } }
```

---

## Host Commands (Client → Server, rejected with `error` if sender is not host)

```json
{ "type": "kick-member",    "targetPeerId": "..." }
{ "type": "toggle-privacy", "isPublic": false }
{ "type": "lock-lobby",     "locked": true }
{ "type": "promote-host",   "targetPeerId": "..." }
```

### Server → Kicked Member

```json
{ "type": "kicked" }
```

---

## Error Response (Server → Client, for any malformed or unauthorized message)

```json
{ "type": "error", "code": "unauthorized" | "malformed" | "not-in-lobby" | "unknown-peer", "message": "Human-readable detail" }
```
